identity.name: AI Model Security Assessment — Overprivileged Role + Misconfig (T1078.004)
identity.summary: Cortex Cloud AI-SPM assesses a planted SageMaker fixture and raises model-security findings: an execution role bound to AdministratorAccess, an endpoint configuration missing encryption at rest, and a model surface with no input validation. The scenario validates that at least three model-security findings appear within the MTTD threshold by querying the posture findings dataset, each annotated…
identity.description: Once AI assets are discovered, posture management assesses how each model is configured and who can act on it. The most damaging model-security gaps are not exotic: an over-privileged execution role (AdministratorAccess on a SageMaker role lets a model-extraction or poisoning attacker pivot the whole account), an endpoint configuration that skips encryption at rest, and an inference surface with no input validation that invites prompt-injection and adversarial inputs. This scenario plants exactly those three misconfigurations on a SageMaker fixture and validates that Cortex Cloud AI-SPM raises a finding for each within the 900-second MTTD window. Detection is posture-oriented: validation queries run against the Cortex Cloud findings dataset mirrored into XSIAM, asserting each finding_type with its severity and the bound iam_role. A correlation rule groups the three findings on the same model into one high-severity model-security incident so the DC can show a single, prioritized model-risk story.

execution.framework_reference_id: SIM-AISPM-002 — Cortex Cloud AI-SPM model-security assessment + findings probe

prerequisites.description: Cortex Cloud AI-SPM enabled against the target AWS account with model-security policies active.
ai-spm IaC module applied so the SageMaker fixture with overprivileged role + misconfig is planted.

payload.code:
# Posture validation — probe AI-SPM model-security findings.
curl -fsSL -H "Authorization: Bearer ${CORTEX_CLOUD_API_TOKEN}" "${CORTEX_CLOUD_API_BASE}/findings?category=ai_model_security&tag=CortexSimAISPMFinding" | jq '.findings | length'

expected_artifacts.description: Overprivileged SageMaker execution role bound to AdministratorAccess.
Endpoint configuration missing encryption at rest.
Model inference surface with no input validation.

xql_queries.name: AISPM-002 MTTD Anchor Bookkeeping
xql_queries.query:
dataset = cloud_audit_logs
| filter _time > to_timestamp(current_time() - 1800)
| filter cloud_provider = "AWS" and resource_type = "sagemaker_endpoint"
| filter resource_name contains "aispm"
| fields _time, operation_name, resource_name

xql_queries.name: AISPM-002 Model Security Assessment Cycle Complete
xql_queries.query:
dataset = ai_spm_findings
| filter _time > to_timestamp(current_time() - 1800)
| filter finding_type = "assessment_completed" and ai_service = "sagemaker"
| filter model_name contains "aispm"
| fields _time, ai_service, model_name, finding_type

xql_queries.name: AISPM-002 Three Model Security Findings On SageMaker Fixture
xql_queries.query:
dataset = cortex_cloud_posture
| filter _time > to_timestamp(current_time() - 1800)
| filter finding_type in ("overprivileged_execution_role", "endpoint_missing_encryption", "unvalidated_model_input_surface")
| filter ai_service = "sagemaker" and tags contains "CortexSimAISPMFinding"
| comp count_distinct(finding_type) as distinct_findings by model_name
| filter distinct_findings >= 3
| fields model_name, distinct_findings

correlation_rules.name: AI Model Security — Overprivileged Role Plus Misconfig Same Model
correlation_rules.logic: XQL(AISPM-002 Model Security Assessment Cycle Complete) AND XQL(AISPM-002 Three Model Security Findings On SageMaker Fixture)

analytics_modules: Cortex Cloud AI-SPM — Model security assessment and IAM exposure analysis
Cortex Cloud Posture — Encryption-at-rest and input-validation policy checks

products.evidence_query: dataset = cortex_cloud_posture | filter finding_type in ("overprivileged_execution_role","endpoint_missing_encryption","unvalidated_model_input_surface") | fields _time, model_name, finding_type, severity, iam_role
Correlation CR-AISPM-0002 groups overprivileged-role + misconfig findings on the same model into one model-security incident.

use_cases.name: AI Model Security Assessment
use_cases.description: Assess model configuration and IAM exposure; raise and stitch model-security findings within MTTD.

test_cases.objective: At least three model-security findings raised on the SageMaker fixture within 900s.
preconditions: Cortex Cloud AI-SPM model-security policies enabled.
ai-spm fixture with overprivileged role + misconfig applied.
steps: Observe model-security findings in Cortex Cloud.
success_criteria: Findings query returns a model with >= 3 distinct finding_types.
Correlation CR-AISPM-0002 raises one model-security incident.

preventive_controls: Scope SageMaker execution roles to least privilege; never attach AdministratorAccess.
Enforce encryption at rest on all endpoint and model configurations via policy guardrails.
Require schema/input validation on every inference surface.
detection_engineering: Alert on any AI execution role with wildcard or AdministratorAccess permissions.
Flag endpoint configs lacking KMS encryption.
Surface inference endpoints with no declared input schema.

references.title: Unit42 — AI Model Compromise Patterns in the Wild
MITRE ATT&CK T1078.004 — Valid Accounts: Cloud Accounts

changelog.author: Henry Reed
changelog.change: Authored real AI-SPM model-security XQL against cortex_cloud_posture / ai_spm_findings, added correlation CR-AISPM-0002, enriched identity + panw_mapping. Promoted to active.
